text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, and Agnes<n>Digital has
arrived, gingerly holding a<n>pack of chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: T-T-Trainer! So, are you ready?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Today, we give praise for thebeautiful ships in our lives—and youwould not believe the amount of love I poured into these Valentine'schocolates!
choice_data_list: Who are you giving them to?
Who are you giving them to?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: We are offering them to my shrine!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She genuinely isn't giving them to<n>anyone. Agnes
Digital sets up a<n>merch shine in my office and lays
down her offerings...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Bon appétit, my Umamusume. Eat to<n>your heart's
content in my<n>imagination...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Even though they aren'teating my chocolate for real, I can stillpicture the look on their faces...Mmm-mmm-mmm...
choice_data_list: Why not give chocolate to the racers themselves?
Why not give chocolate to the racers themselves?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: U-unthinkable! I can't give to myidols!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's say that I did. That would be<n>making myself
noticeable to them,<n>and they might even feel
obligated to<n>give me something in return.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Not to mention how egotistical it is topresume that my feelings areworth communicating to them at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Simping should be done from afar, so<n>I merely
look respectfully and<n>celebrate discreetly.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital doesn't want to draw<n>attention from
those she worships, so<n>I suppose this alternative
is all right.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All righty, Trainer. I've finished my<n>prayer, so let's
eat up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Now that we've finished<n>making our
offering, stage two is<n>where we eat the chocolates
and<n>discuss how precious our oshis are.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, I am truly blessed. I never<n>thought fate
would bring me a<n>companion I can share my love
of<n>Umas with!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now, don't hold back<n>today—open up your
heart and spill<n>everything. Tell me... who's your
favorite oshi these days?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell you mine. Recently, I just<n>absolutely can't
stop thinking about...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Gaaahh... Actually, there's no<n>way I can
choose! There are too<n>many!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital swoons in ecstasy as<n>we indulge in
chocolates and chatter<n>about Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure "oshi" is the correct way<n>to put it, but
as her trainer...
choice_data_list: Here, I've got some chocolate for you.
Here, I've got some chocolate for you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah? Chocolate for... me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, WHAAAT?! CHOCOLAAATE?!<n>FOR
MEEE?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what?! This is kinda out of<n>nowhere! Why
are you putting me up<n>on a pedestal like this?!
choice_data_list: Enjoy and keep up the good work!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what is this all-encompassing<n>love? Every
Valentine's Day, I'm<n>just a plebeian spectator...
Do you<n>really want to cheer me on?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But who else would simp for an<n>Umamusume as
niche as me? I knew<n>you were a die-hard Uma
fan! A simp<n>after my own heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're the model otaku! Today,<n>you've given me
something even<n>more important than chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can get through the next five or even<n>ten
Valentine's if you're with me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, let's continue offering up our love<n>to Umas
together. Let's swear it on<n>the shrine... t-together!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At Agnes Digital's insistence, I vow<n>to support her
and her faves moving<n>forward.
